title: Change a Score
summary: Change a number in a memory box.
mission_prompt: Start a score at 1, add 1, then make Python say the new score.
learning_goals: Change the value in the memory box.
hints: score = score + 1 means use the old score to make a new score.
The print line should happen after the score changes.
adult_guidance: Ask the child to point at the line where the score changes.
